sidebar.tts_desc: Generation via ElevenLabs or Local TTS.

main.garage_desc: Assemble your project's engine, call FFmpeg, and watch the magic of automation.
main.timeline_desc: Professional Web Multi-Track Editor. Edit like Premiere or CapCut.
main.node_studio_desc: Connect the dots and create AI-generated visual workflows.
main.macro_assembler_desc: Bulk cuts and effects automation. (For automatic faceless channels).
main.render_queue_desc: Manage your pending videos sent to the Render Farm or VPS.
main.analytics_desc: Channel Stats, Gas Costs, and Stored S3 Projects.
main.api_keys_desc: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) settings to run with almost free gas.

modal.upload_desc: Direct upload via browser using Presigned URL (Zero Server load).

garage.engine_desc: Drag and drop the parts (videos/audios) into the engine block and configure FFmpeg to render ultra fast spending your Gas.
garage.drop_zone: + Drag and Drop Parts Here (Videos, Audios, Images)

config.byok_desc: The secret to zero cost: bring your own API keys. Apollo will use them directly and you will spend almost zero Gas to generate videos.
config.openrouter_help: Used for story generator and transcription.
config.pixabay_help: Free B-Roll image and video bank.
config.elevenlabs_help: Optional. If blank, Apollo's Local TTS will be used.

login.title: Access Studio
login.subtitle: Log in to continue
login.signup_subtitle: Sign up to receive Free Gas

tanque.description: Explore your generated media in the Workspace. Double click to play or click 'Copy Path'.
tanque.no_files: No files found in the Workspace.

market.hacker_course_desc: Learn how to run Apollo Edit 100% Local (RVC, Pinokio, BYOK API) and eliminate your server costs! + Lifetime Badge.
market.cloud_storage_desc: Increase your disk space in the Apollo cloud to store more heavy projects. Monthly subscription.
